components.name: addr2line
components.description: A cross-platform symbolication library written in Rust, using `gimli`

components.name: adler2
components.description: A simple clean-room implementation of the Adler-32 checksum

components.name: allocator-api2
components.description: Mirror of Rust's allocator API

components.name: backtrace
components.description: A library to acquire a stack trace (backtrace) at runtime in a Rust program.

components.name: bitflags
components.description: A macro to generate structures which behave like bitflags.

components.name: cassowary
components.description:
A Rust implementation of the Cassowary linear constraint solving algorithm.

The Cassowary algorithm is designed for naturally laying out user interfaces using linear constraints,
like 'this button must line up with this text box'.

components.name: castaway
components.description: Safe, zero-cost downcasting for limited compile-time specialization.

components.name: cfg-if
components.description:
A macro to ergonomically define an item depending on a large number of #[cfg]
parameters. Structured like an if-else chain, the first matching branch is the
item that gets emitted.

components.name: color-eyre
components.description: An error report handler for panics and eyre::Reports for colorful, consistent, and well formatted error reports for all kinds of errors.

components.name: color-spantrace
components.description: A pretty printer for tracing_error::SpanTrace based on color-backtrace

components.name: compact_str
components.description: A memory efficient string type that transparently stores strings on the stack, when possible

components.name: crossterm
components.description: A crossplatform terminal library for manipulating terminals.

components.name: crossterm_winapi
components.description: WinAPI wrapper that provides some basic simple abstractions around common WinAPI calls

components.name: darling
components.description:
A proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when
implementing custom derives.

components.name: darling_core
components.description:
Helper crate for proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when
implementing custom derives. Use https://crates.io/crates/darling in your code.

components.name: darling_macro
components.description:
Internal support for a proc-macro library for reading attributes into structs when
implementing custom derives. Use https://crates.io/crates/darling in your code.

components.name: either
components.description: The enum `Either` with variants `Left` and `Right` is a general purpose sum type with two cases.

components.name: scopeguard
components.description:
A RAII scope guard that will run a given closure when it goes out of scope,
even if the code between panics (assuming unwinding panic).

Defines the macros `defer!`, `defer_on_unwind!`, `defer_on_success!` as
shorthands for guards with one of the implemented strategies.
